DynamicTokens.Name: SpiritWalk_SnS
DynamicTokens.Value: /waitForAllStationary/speak WoodsmanHurst "I sometime have dreams of this cave. I feel something within there. I do not know what....$2"/pause 250/message "Hurst shakes his head and then smiles at you."/speak WoodsmanHurst "Ignore me. I am merely thinking out loud. Let us continue.$1"
